summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GetLocal V2 Managed Marketplace - voice-first blue-collar hiring platform. All core features working correctly including voice onboarding, recruiter dashboard, admin panel, and API integrations.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 500 instead of 400 when testing with JSON instead of multipart/form-data
minor_issues.impact: Expected behavior - endpoint correctly requires multipart data

ui_bugs.issue: Language selection not properly updating value attribute in test

passed_tests: GET /api/wallet - Returns wallet with correct balance
POST /api/unlock - Successfully unlocks candidates and deducts credits
Credit deduction verification - 10 credits properly deducted
Voice Onboarding page loads with mic button and pulse animation
Recruiter Dashboard shows candidate cards with masked phone numbers
Credit balance displays and updates correctly
Admin Dashboard stats cards show correct data (5 candidates, 2 open jobs, 100 credits sold)
WhatsApp Blast button changes state to 'Blasting...' and back
Bottom Navigation works correctly between all 3 pages
